_comment: Sample hooks configuration. Copy to .claude/settings.json to enable. All hooks are advisory except PreToolUse, which can block a tool call by exiting non-zero or emitting {"block": true, "reason": "..."} on stdout.

SessionStart._comment: Logs session start to a local file for audit.

PreToolUse._comment: Guards destructive Bash commands (rm -rf, curl | sh, etc.).

PostToolUse._comment: Runs formatter on edited Python files. Uncomment to enable.

Stop._comment: Records final transcript + verify.json gate at end of turn.

StopFailure._comment: Fires only when a turn ends in failure (e.g. iteration cap).
